checkout.inline_help_text.message: Make sure it’s clear that clicking this button will allow your customer to pay.

checkout_error.default.message: There was a problem setting up checkout. Please contact the person who sent you this quote.

checkout_error.inline_help_text.message: Tell your customer what to do when there's a problem starting checkout.

heading_tag.help_text.message: Choose a heading level. H1 is the largest, followed by H2, and so on

make_first_payment.inline_help_text.message: Your customer will see this in the payment button until they've paid the first instalment.

need_signature.default.message: Payment can't be made because the quote isn't fully signed.

need_signature.label.message: Explanation text when signatures are needed

need_signature.inline_help_text.message: If signatures are required before payment, your customer will see this message until all required signatures are completed.

payment_status_error.default.message: There was a problem loading the payment status for this quote. Please try refreshing the page.

payment_status_error.inline_help_text.message: Tell your customer to refresh the page when fetching payment status fails.

test_mode.default.message: This is a test quote, so it can't collect real payments.

inline_help_text.message: You can decide if you want to collect payment when you create a quote with this template.

payment_removed.default.message: To checkout, please contact the person who sent you this quote.
